zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Eland於1348年6月之後出生在英國英格蘭越可爾艾藍德時，她的父親Thomas Eland8695歲，母親Joan Melton8687歲。她於1353年之前與Sir John Savile在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1423年在英國越可爾恩爾，埋葬在英國藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Eland于1348年6月之后出生在英国英格兰越可爾艾藍德时，她的父亲Thomas Eland8695岁，母亲Joan Melton8687岁。她于1353年之前与Sir John Savile在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1423年在英国越可爾恩爾，埋葬在英国藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可。

nameMeanings.name: Eland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Elland (Yorkshire) or Little Eland (Northumberland), both of which derive their names from Old English ēaland ‘cultivated land by water or a river’.
Dutch: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements adel ‘noble’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Eland was born after June 1348, in Elland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Eland, was 8695 and her mother, Joan Melton, was 8687. She married Sir John Savile before 1353, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1423, in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, and was buried in Ormskirk, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Eland est née après juin 1348, à Elland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Eland, avait 8695 ans et sa mère, Joan Melton, avait 8687 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Savile avant 1353, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1423, à Thornhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Ormskirk, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Eland nach Juni 1348 in Elland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Eland 8695 und ihre Mutter Joan Melton 8687. Sie hat vor 1353 in England Sir John Savile geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1423 in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Ormskirk, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Eland è nata il dopo il giugno 1348 nel Elland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Eland, aveva 8695 anni e sua madre, Joan Melton, aveva 8687 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Savile prima del 1353, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1423, nel Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, e fu sepolta a Ormskirk, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Elandが1348年6月以後にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアエランドで生まれた時，父Thomas Elandは8695歳，母Joan Meltonは8687歳であった。1353年以前にイギリスでSir John Savileと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1423年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒルで死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアオルムスキルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Eland(이)가 1348년 6월 이후 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 엘랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Eland(은)는 8695세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Melton(은)는 8687세였다. 그녀는 1353년 이전 영국에서 Sir John Savile(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1423년 영국 요르크실르 토른힐에서 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 오스커크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Eland nasceu após junho de 1348, em Elland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Eland, tinha 8695 anos e sua mãe, Joan Melton, tinha 8687 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Savile antes 1353, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1423, em Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Ormskirk, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Eland родилась после июнь 1348 г. в местности элланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Eland было 8695 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Melton, 8687. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Savile перед 1353 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1423 г. в местности таурнилл, еркшир, Англия и была похоронена в местности ормскирк, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Eland nació después de junio de 1348, en Elland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Eland, tenía 8695 años y su mamá, Joan Melton, tenía 8687 años. Se casó con Sir John Savile antes de 1353, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1423, en Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Ormskirk, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
